description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a high-wing configuration and a classic taildragger landing gear setup. The fuselage is primarily cream-colored with vivid orange accents on the nose, wingtips, and tail, and a white cross insignia is visible on the vertical stabilizer. The cockpit is enclosed and positioned at the front of the fuselage, featuring a clear canopy. The wings are straight and mounted high above the fuselage, supported by struts. The landing gear consists of two main wheels under the wings and a small tailwheel at the rear. The propeller is mounted at the nose, indicating a piston engine configuration.
description: A small, cream and orange high-wing airplane with a single front propeller, enclosed cockpit, and taildragger landing gear. Features include a straight wing, strut supports, and a classic tail design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the cream fuselage, orange nose and tail, high-mounted straight wings, and the cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full wingspan, taildragger gear, and the vertical stabilizer with insignia.
description_view_2: Top-down view from the opposite side, again showing the high-wing, orange accents, and cockpit placement.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the propeller, landing gear, and the forward-positioned cockpit canopy.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with visible strut supports and no winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
